race.comment: CAIRO QUEEN (6) progressed nicely last time out at the second run of the campaign and finished 6 lengths from the winner in third over 1400m at Beaudesert after being prominent at the corner. Tackling a more suitable race so she is perfectly placed to score. BRASS BAND (1) was in the firing line on the turn and finished third last start over 1400m at Sunshine Coast, beaten 2.75 lengths. This is an easier assignment and can take this out.TEDDY TOO CHEAP (5) was below his best last time when 11th over 1350m at Doomben, beaten 8 lengths. Has the ability to put the recent run behind him. WINNING FLAME (10) rounds out the selections in a race with only a handful of chances.
